projects.name: Elfie
content: Role: Mobile Developer • March 2024 - January 2026

Elfie is a free digital health app designed to motivate users to monitor and improve their health by offering rewards for healthy behaviours. It combines health tracking with gamification to support users in managing chronic conditions and adopting healthier lifestyles.
- Implement and manage HealthKit and Google Health Connect integration
- Native side (iOS, Android) integration
- Develop new features
- Researching and evaluating new technologies for the app
- Maintaining code base
